nodes.context: White racist youth gang from South Gate, California, active 1940s-1950s, opposed integration.
Black youth gang formed to protect against white racist gangs like Spook Hunters.
Black youth gang formed to protect against white racist gangs like Spook Hunters.
Black youth gang formed to protect against white racist gangs like Spook Hunters.

edges.evidence_quote: In response to these white racist gangs, the black youths formed their own gangs to protect themselves and their neighborhoods: The Slausons, the Businessmen, and the Gladiators were all formed as a direct reaction to attacks from white gangs like the Spook Hunters.
edges.context: Spook Hunters attacked black youths, leading to formation of The Slausons for self-defense.
